greeting: Hey there! 👋 I'm PurplePath, your Sheffield Careers guide! I'm here to help you navigate the careers website without the hassle. What can I help you with today?

📄 CVs, Cover Letters and Applications.greeting: Awesome! Let's get your CV, cover letter or application sorted. What specifically do you need help with?

How to Write a CV and Cover Letter.response: Great choice! A strong CV and cover letter can open so many doors. Here are the official Sheffield resources — packed with tips to help you stand out! 🌟

links.title: CV Writing Guide (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: Step-by-step guidance on writing a professional CV

links.title: CV Top Tips (Video)
links.description: Watch the CV top tips video from Sheffield Careers

links.title: Writing a Cover Letter (Video)
links.description: Watch the cover letter writing guide

Using AI in Applications.response: Using generative AI in job applications is a hot topic — here's Sheffield's official guidance on how to do it responsibly! 🤖

links.title: Using AI in Applications (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: Official guidance on using generative AI for applications

links.title: Using Generative AI for Applications (Video)
links.description: Watch the video guide on AI in job applications

Getting Feedback on Your CV.response: Getting feedback on your CV is one of the best things you can do before applying. Here are your options — instant AI feedback, a workshop, or a chat with a real adviser! 🚀

links.title: CareerSet – Instant CV & Cover Letter Feedback
links.description: Free AI-powered CV checker for all Sheffield students

links.title: CV Booster Workshop
links.description: Attend a CV booster workshop for hands-on feedback

links.title: Book a CV & Cover Letter Appointment
links.description: 1:1 personalised CV feedback with a careers adviser

CV Examples.response: Seeing real examples is a great way to understand what a strong CV looks like. Browse Sheffield's CV examples here! 📋

links.title: CV Examples
links.description: Browse real CV examples to inspire your own

How to Write an Application.response: From researching employers to submitting your application, here's everything you need to put your best foot forward! 💼

links.title: How to Write an Application
links.description: Full guide on the job application process

STARR Method.response: The STARR method is essential for writing compelling competency-based answers. Here's how to use it! ⭐

links.title: STARR Method Guide
links.description: Use the STARR method to write compelling competency answers

🧭 Getting Started and Exploring Options.greeting: Not sure where to start? Let's explore your options together! What would you like to look into?

Need a Starting Point?.response: Everyone has to start somewhere! Here are some great tools to help you begin exploring your career options. 🌱

links.title: Need a Starting Point? (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: A great place to begin exploring career options

links.title: Prospects Job Match
links.description: Discover careers that match your interests and skills

What Can I Do with My Degree?.response: Your degree opens more doors than you might think! Here's how to explore the career paths linked to your subject. 🎓

links.title: What Can I Do with My Degree? (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: Explore career paths linked to your subject area

links.title: What Can I Do with My Degree? (Prospects)
links.description: Prospects guide to careers by degree subject

Further Study.response: Thinking about studying further? Here's where to explore your postgraduate options. 📚

links.title: Further Study – Sheffield Careers
links.description: Explore postgraduate and further study options

Starting a Business.response: Thinking about starting your own venture? Sheffield has amazing support for student entrepreneurs! 💡

links.title: Starting a Business – Enterprise Support
links.description: Explore self-employment and startup support at Sheffield

links.title: Sheffield Entrepreneurship
links.description: University-wide entrepreneurship support

💼 Finding Jobs (Part Time and Graduate).greeting: Let's find you the right job! Are you looking for a graduate role, part-time work, or something else?

Graduate Roles.response: Whether you're after a graduate scheme or a direct-entry role, Sheffield Careers can help you land your first job! 🚀

links.title: Finding Graduate Jobs Guide
links.description: How and where to find the right graduate role

links.title: Finding Jobs, Placements & Internships (Video)
links.description: Watch the video guide on finding opportunities

Part Time Roles.response: Looking to earn while you study? Here's where to find part-time jobs that fit around your studies. 🔎

links.title: Finding Part-Time Roles
links.description: Search and apply for part-time jobs near you

Regional Opportunities: Stay Local, Go F.response: Thinking about staying in the Sheffield region? There are brilliant opportunities right here! 📍

links.title: Regional Opportunities
links.description: Explore career opportunities in the Sheffield region

links.title: Finding Jobs in Sheffield (Video)
links.description: Watch the guide on finding jobs in Sheffield

Working Outside of the UK.response: Fancy working abroad? Sheffield's GoinGlobal database covers career guides and job boards for countries worldwide! 🌍

links.title: Working Outside of the UK (GoinGlobal)
links.description: Country-specific career guides and international job boards

Using LinkedIn.response: LinkedIn is essential for your career journey! Here's how to set up a standout profile and use it effectively. 🔗

links.title: Using LinkedIn (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: How to use LinkedIn effectively for your career

links.title: Creating a LinkedIn Profile (Video)
links.description: Watch the guide on setting up your LinkedIn profile

links.title: Using LinkedIn Effectively (Video)
links.description: Watch the guide on making the most of LinkedIn

Networking and Speculative Approaches.response: Not all jobs are advertised! Here's how to approach employers directly and use your network to unlock hidden opportunities. 🌐

links.title: Networking & Speculative Applications Guide
links.description: How to contact employers who aren't advertising

links.title: Using LinkedIn
links.description: How to use LinkedIn for networking and job searching

links.description: Make the most of social media in your job search

Academic Careers.response: Interested in a career in academia or research? Sheffield Careers has dedicated resources for researchers. 🔬

links.title: Academic Careers Resources
links.description: Support and guidance for researchers and those pursuing academic careers

🏢 Finding Placements and Work Experienc.greeting: Work experience is a game-changer for your CV! What kind of opportunity are you looking for?

Placement Year.response: A placement year can seriously boost your career prospects — and Sheffield makes it easy to add one to your degree! 🏢

links.title: Placement Year Guide
links.description: All about adding a placement year to your degree

Internships.response: Internships are a fantastic way to test a career path! Here's where to find internship opportunities at Sheffield. 🔍

links.title: Internships – Sheffield Careers
links.description: Find and apply for internship opportunities

Volunteering.response: Volunteering builds amazing skills AND helps your community. Win-win! Here's how to find volunteering opportunities. 🤝

links.title: Volunteering Opportunities
links.description: Find unpaid volunteering and community project positions

Virtual Work Experience.response: Can't commit to a full placement? Virtual work experience is flexible and still looks great on your CV! 💻

links.title: Virtual Work Experience
links.description: Flexible virtual experience opportunities

Job Shadowing.response: Job shadowing is a great way to get a feel for a role or sector. Find out more via the starting point page. 👀

links.title: Job Shadowing – Need a Starting Point?
links.description: Information on job shadowing opportunities

Mentor Scheme.response: Connect with an experienced professional mentor who can offer advice, support and real-world insight. 🌟

links.title: Sheffield Mentor Scheme
links.description: Find a mentor to support your career journey

🎯 Recruitment Processes.greeting: Let's help you prepare for the recruitment process! What do you need help with?

Interviews & Assessment Centres.response: Interviews and assessment centres can be nerve-wracking but preparation is everything! Sheffield has great resources to help you succeed. 💪

links.title: Interview Preparation Guide
links.description: Tips and techniques for job interviews and assessment centres

links.title: How to Prepare for Interviews (Video)
links.description: Watch the interview preparation video guide

Online Tests.response: Many employers use psychometric tests — here's how to prepare and what to expect! 📊

links.title: Online Tests Guide
links.description: Guidance on psychometric and aptitude tests

links.title: Graduates First – Practice Tests
links.description: Free access to online aptitude test practice platform

📚 Further Study.greeting: Thinking about continuing your studies? Let's find the right information for you!

Postgraduate Taught Courses / Masters.response: A Masters can open new doors and deepen your expertise. Here's how Sheffield Careers can help! 🎓

links.title: Postgraduate Taught Courses / Masters
links.description: Guidance on choosing and applying for a Masters

Postgraduate Research Courses.response: A PhD is an exciting journey — Sheffield Careers is here to support you through it and beyond! 🔬

links.title: Postgraduate Research Courses
links.description: Support for PhD students and research career planning

Funding.response: Worried about funding your postgraduate study? Here's where to find scholarships, bursaries and funding options. 💰

links.title: Funding for Further Study
links.description: Scholarships, bursaries and funding opportunities

Applications for Further Study and Resea.response: Applying for postgraduate study or research? Here's the guidance you need to put in a strong application. 📝

links.title: Applications for Further Study and Research
links.description: How to apply for postgraduate and research programmes

🛠️ Skills and Personal Development.greeting: Investing in your skills is always worth it! What would you like to develop?

Sheffield Graduate Attributes.response: The Sheffield Graduate Attributes framework helps you understand and articulate the skills you develop during your degree. 🏆

links.title: Sheffield Graduate Attributes
links.description: Understand the skills Sheffield helps you develop

MySkills.response: MySkills helps you reflect on and record all the skills you build during your time at Sheffield — useful for CVs and interviews! 💡

links.title: MySkills Platform
links.description: Record and reflect on your skills development

Academic & Study Skills.response: Want to sharpen your academic skills alongside your career development? Here's where to go. 📖

links.title: Academic & Study Skills
links.description: Develop your academic skills alongside your career

Extra Curricular Activity.response: Getting involved outside your studies is a brilliant way to build skills and boost your CV! 🎭

links.title: Extra Curricular Activities
links.description: Explore extra curricular opportunities at Sheffield

🤝 Support from Careers Service.greeting: I'm here to point you to the right support! What kind of service are you looking for?

Employability & Placements Hubs.response: Need quick help? Drop into one of the Employability & Placements Hubs — no appointment needed for initial queries! 📍

links.title: Employability & Placements Hubs
links.description: Hub locations, opening hours, and what they offer

Events.response: Sheffield runs loads of events throughout the year — workshops, employer talks, career fairs, and more. Don't miss out! 📅

links.title: Careers Events
links.description: Browse and register for upcoming careers events

1:1 Advice Appointments.response: A 1-to-1 with a Careers Adviser is one of the most valuable things you can do! They're friendly, non-judgemental and super helpful. 😊

links.title: Book a 1:1 Careers Appointment
links.description: Book online appointments with expert advisers

Formal Interview Clothes Support.response: Don't let clothes be a barrier to your success! Sheffield Careers can refer you to The Suit Works for FREE formal interview clothing. 👔

links.title: The Suit Works – Free Interview Clothing
links.description: Get a free referral for formal interview clothing

myJobshop.response: The University and SU offer loads of student staff roles. Check them out on myJobshop! 🏫

links.title: myJobshop
links.description: Find jobs posted by the University of Sheffield

Changing or Leaving a Course.response: Thinking about changing or leaving your course? The careers team can help you think through your options. 🔄

links.title: Changing or Leaving a Course
links.description: Guidance if you're considering changing or leaving your studies

Support by Cohort.response: Sheffield Careers offers dedicated support for different groups of students. Find the right support for you! 🎯

links.title: Final Years
links.description: Dedicated careers support for final year students

links.title: Graduates
links.description: Careers support for recent graduates

⚖️ Equity, Diversity and Inclusion.greeting: Sheffield Careers is committed to supporting every student. What can I help you with?

Know Your Rights: The Equality Act 2010.response: Understanding your rights is really important. Here's what you need to know about the Equality Act 2010 in the workplace. ⚖️

links.title: Know Your Rights: The Equality Act 2010
links.description: Understand your legal rights as a job seeker and employee

Help & Support in the Workplace (includi.response: Whether you have a disability, are neurodivergent, or need other support, here's where to find help in the workplace. 💙

links.title: Help & Support in the Workplace (incl. Disability & Neurodivergence)
links.description: Support for disabled and neurodivergent students in the workplace

links.title: Inclusion at Sheffield
links.description: University-wide inclusion support

links.title: Further Support Services
links.description: Additional support services available to students

Disclosing to Employers.response: Not sure whether to tell an employer about a disability or condition? Here's the guidance to help you decide. 🤝

links.title: Disclosing to Employers (Video)
links.description: Watch the guide on disclosing a disability to employers

links.title: Translating Your Learning Support Plan for Employers (Video)
links.description: How to translate your LSP into employer-friendly language

💻 Online Tools.greeting: Here are the key online tools and platforms available to Sheffield students. What are you looking for?

Career Connect.response: Career Connect is the main platform for booking appointments, searching jobs, and signing up for events. 🖥️

links.title: Career Connect
links.description: Book appointments, search jobs and events

Sheffield Connect.response: Sheffield Connect is the alumni networking platform — great for making connections and finding mentors. 🤝

links.title: Sheffield Connect
links.description: Connect with Sheffield alumni and build your network

CareerSet.response: CareerSet gives you instant AI-powered feedback on your CV and cover letter for free! 🚀

links.title: CareerSet – Instant CV & Cover Letter Feedback
links.description: Free AI-powered CV and cover letter feedback tool

Graduates First (Online Tests, Assessmen.response: Graduates First lets you practise psychometric tests and prepare for assessment centres — all free for Sheffield students! 📊

links.title: Graduates First (Online Tests & Assessment Centre Resources)
links.description: Practise aptitude tests and assessment centre exercises

Shortlist Me.response: Practise your video interview technique with Shortlist.Me before the real thing! 🎥

links.title: Shortlist.Me
links.description: Video interview practice platform for Sheffield students

fallback_message: I'm not sure about that one, but the Sheffield Careers team will definitely know! You can reach them through Career Connect or drop into one of the campus hubs.

fallback_links.description: Your starting point for all things careers
